title: sideritis clandestina subsp. peloponnesiaca
intro: Sideritis clandestina subsp. peloponnesiaca, also known as the Peloponnesian mountain tea or Greek mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis clandestina plant, native to Greece. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis clandestina subsp. peloponnesiaca include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or it can be used in supplements or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional Greek medicine.
